source_pr.title: stats: refine index row count estimation
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)

Since the query pattern on the index always contains some equal conditions on the first several columns and a range condition on the last column, this pr uses CM Sketch to estimate the equal condition and histogram to estimate the range conditions, assumes that these two part are independent.

## What are the type of the changes (mandatory)?

- Improvement (non-breaking change which is an improvement to an existing feature)

## How has this PR been tested (mandatory)?

unit test

## Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional)

https://github.com/pingcap/tikv/pull/3206

PTAL @coocood @winoros @zz-jason @fipped
